name: store_sales_net_profit
description: Regressor that fits store-sale net profit from paid amount and wholesale cost.
comment: Structured monetary regression over store-sales measures where the target is not passed as an input.

name: store_sales_net_paid
description: Three-input regressor that fits net paid from extended sales price, discount amount, and tax.
comment: Included as a structured arithmetic regression task over standard TPC-DS sales measures, where the target should be closely determined by the provided monetary inputs.

name: store_sales_discount_band_classifier
description: Classifier that predicts a discount band directly from the extended discount amount.
comment: Included as a direct thresholding classifier where the target bucket is defined entirely by ss_ext_discount_amt, making it a clean sanity-check classification task.
target_expression: CASE WHEN ss_ext_discount_amt < 5 THEN 0 WHEN ss_ext_discount_amt < 15 THEN 1 WHEN ss_ext_discount_amt < 30 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END
